_superseded: This file previously held a headless run with EMPTY transcripts (no working STT/TTS). It is superseded by VE-01: a live multi-turn round-trip through the real WebSocket server with current providers.

headline.v2vDominatedBy: LLM time-to-first-token (~3.3s); speech-in/out parts (STT-final near-instant, TTS first-byte ~330ms) are fast
headline.v2vScopeNote: v2v reduction is VE-05 work and is dominated by LLM TTFT, which is outside VE-01's speech-in/speech-out scope

knownHarnessGaps.negativeSpeechEndAnchor: Turns 02/03 show negative speechEndToFirstAudio because the harness marks audio-ended at clip-feed-end, but the engine endpoints and responds mid-feed on long fixtures. Measurement-anchor bug, not an engine defect. Fix tracked in .handoff/brief-ve01-tracer-manifest-fix.md.
knownHarnessGaps.opusDurationProvenance: smoke:websocket-interactive currently exits non-zero on its manifest validator (Opus wire/decoded byte provenance + duration math). Engine output is correct; the harness manifest builder is incomplete for Opus. Fix tracked alongside the anchor fix.
